protocol.adjuvant: FLOT4 x4 cycles pre-op + surgery + FLOT4 x4 cycles post-op
protocol.notes: HER2 testing mandatory. PD-L1 CPS score guides immunotherapy eligibility.
protocol.ecog_note: ECOG 1 — standard treatment. Monitor closely for toxicity.
genomic_notes: 🧬 HER2 positive — trastuzumab + chemotherapy (ToGA trial, OS benefit). Stage IV: trastuzumab + CAPOX or 5-FU/cisplatin (first-line standard). Second-line: trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd, DESTINY-Gastric01).
🧬 PD-L1 CPS = 8 (≥5) — nivolumab + chemotherapy indicated (CheckMate-649). OS benefit demonstrated for CPS≥5. Consider pembrolizumab + chemo (KEYNOTE-590).
